name: foundry-transpile
description: A source-to-source transpiler built on a shared typed IR: 5 source languages in (MiniLang, JavaScript, Python, TypeScript, C), 12 target languages out (JS, Python, C, Go, Java, C#, Rust, Lua, Kotlin, Zig, PHP, Dart), every path output-verified by running the generated code.
author: Ross Ward
